_documentation._comment: This file configures the patch notes displayed in the modal (English version)

_usage.version: Patch version (e.g., '0.6', '1.0', '2.1') - used for PATCHNOTE{version without dot}.png image
_usage.content.title: Title displayed at the top of the modal
_usage.content.sections: Array of objects containing note sections
_usage.section.title: Section title (supports emojis)
_usage.section.items: Array of strings - list of items in this section

_documentation._imageNaming: The patch image should be named PATCHNOTE{VERSION_WITHOUT_DOT}.png in /public/

sections._comment: New features section - use emojis to make it more attractive
sections.title: 🆕 New Features
items: Added game continuation (approximately 5 hours of gameplay)
Proper logo for Shiny Pokémon in battle
Added Fresque-Haute Breeding (location allowing reset of Alternative Shiny Pokémon)
Many new Pokémon make their appearance

sections.title: 🔧 Fixes
items: Fixed crash related to Moon Ball
Fixed crash related to Fmod (during evolution)
Fixed the following abilities: Salt Cure, Cruelty, Cursed Body, Illusion
